name: Dotfiles Sync
description: Clones a dotfiles repository and applies it to the container user, supporting install scripts, symlinks, and direct copying

repository.description: Git repository URL containing dotfiles (e.g. https://github.com/user/dotfiles.git)

installCommand.description: Command to run after cloning (e.g. ./install, make install). Leave empty to auto-detect.

syncMethod.description: How to apply dotfiles: auto (detect), symlink, copy, or none
